data.name: swagger_description
data.value: Documentation of APIs available for WIS

data.name: swagger_param_empresa_egreso_getegresoporcodigocamion
data.value: Company code. Only to validate access

data.name: swagger_param_empresa_egreso_getegresoporidexterno
data.value: Company code for the external delivery identifer

data.name: swagger_remarks_agenda_create
data.value: Description: Each planning of a goods entry into the system is numbered and identifed with a schedule number. From the data provided, the API creates a new schedule for the entry of goods. Valid reception types depend on the company's confguration and permissions. The ones enabled by default unless restricted are:-SOC: Mono Inbound reception (Inbound type:OC), -REFREC: Mono Inbound reception (Inbound type:RR), -MOC: Multiple Inbound reception ( Inbound Type:OC), - SOD: Multiple Return Order (Order type:OD), -DIGLIB: Lines of the schedule are entered freely by typing, -DEVOD: Mono return order(Type:OD), -DDIGLI: Idem like DIGLIB but for return orders. For additional information on reception fows, please refer to the system manual. Notas:Format notes: Decimals must be sent with'.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_agenda_getagenda
data.value: Description: Obtains data from a schedule through the number that identifes it. The information provided corresponds to the head of the agenda and to all the product details. If the schedule has already been received, it is possible to obtain the quantities received for each product. Notes:The information in these felds is not included because it is already detailed in the input API. R

data.name: swagger_remarks_agenda_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to create a schedule.

data.name: swagger_remarks_agente_createorupdate
data.value: Description: The Agent concept for WIS comprises a company's suppliers and customers. The way to differentiate whether it is a supplier or a customer is with the feld "tipo", CLI For customers, PRO for suppliers. From the data provided, it creates new agents if they do not exist, otherwise it updates them. Notes:Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/ dd/yyyy] y [MM - dd yyyy

data.name: swagger_remarks_agente_getagente
data.value: Description: Gets an agent by agent code, type and company.

data.name: swagger_remarks_agente_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses previously generated error interface to create or update an agent.

data.name: swagger_remarks_ajustesdestock_getdata
data.value: Description: This interface details all the information of a movement of goods in stock.

data.name: swagger_remarks_anulacionreferenciarecepcion_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to cancel inbounds.

data.name: swagger_remarks_anulacionreferenciarecepcion_update
data.value: Description: Based on the data provided, the references are cancelled. Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_codigobarras_createupdateordelete
data.value: Description: The functionality is determined by the type of operation sent. Alta: A new barcode is created with the following data. Sobrescritura: If the barcode exists it will update the existing data including the product code. Baja: If the barcode exists it will be removed. Note:Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/ yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_codigobarras_getcodigobarras
data.value: Description: Obtains a barcode by the code and the company.

data.name: swagger_remarks_codigobarras_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to create, overwrite or delete a barcode.

data.name: swagger_remarks_confirmaciondepedido_getdata
data.value: Description: This interface details all the information of the goods shipped, outgoing goods information, orders with their lines and containers with their corresponding preparation details. The generation is executed when the delivery is closed on the WMS.

data.name: swagger_remarks_confirmacionderecepcion_getdata
data.value: Description: This interface details all the information of an entry of goods into the system. Reception data such as inbounds or references with their respective details. It is generated at the moment of closing a schedule.

data.name: swagger_remarks_consultadestock_getdata
data.value: Description: Retrives lots and quantities for the products of a given company.Multiple optional flters are available.Includes confgurable paging handling to control the amount of data returned. The page you want must be sent in the application.In case the flters do not return stock or the submitted page does not exist, the following message will be returned"No stock was found for the flters sent."

data.name: swagger_remarks_egreso_create
data.value: Description: Each planning of a goods exit from the system is numbered and identifed with a delivery number. Based on the data provided, the API creates a new outgoing shipment for the outgoing goods. For additional information on reception fows, please refer to the system manual. Notes:Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/ dd/yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_egreso_getegresoporcodigocamion
data.value: Description: Get delivery data from a shipment identifer. The company's only request is to validate access and use of this API, particularly in this case. Notes: The information in these felds is not included because it is already detailed in the input API.

data.name: swagger_remarks_egreso_getegresoporidexterno
data.value: Description: Obtains delivery data from an external identifer and the company code. The delivery's external identifer is the number used by the ERP or the company to identify the delivery. Notes: The information in these felds is not included because it is already detailed in the input API.

data.name: swagger_remarks_egreso_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the error interface previously generated when registering an outfow.

data.name: swagger_remarks_empresa_createorupdate
data.value: Description:From the data provided, it creates new companies if they do not exist, otherwise it updates them. Note:Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/ yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_empresa_getempresa
data.value: Description: Obtains a company by code

data.name: swagger_remarks_empresa_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to create or update a company.

data.name: swagger_remarks_facturacion_getdata
data.value: Description: This interface details all the information of the goods invoiced prior to shipment, summarizes outgoing data, outbounds with their corresponding lines and containers with their corresponding preparation details (Packing list information). It is generated at the time of billing a delivery Note: Although the interface is called "Billing" can also be referred to as "Prepared merchandise".

data.name: swagger_remarks_lpn_create
data.value:
Description:
From the data provided, the API creates a LPN with its details and definition of attributes.
Grades: Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . The accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] and [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_lpn_getlpn
data.value:
Description:
Gets data from a LPN based on the number that identifies it.
Grades: The information of these fields is not included because it is already detailed in the input API.

data.name: swagger_remarks_lpn_getlpnbyidexternotipo
data.value:
Description:
Gets data from a LPN based on the external identifier and type.
Grades: The information of these fields is not included because it is already detailed in the input API.

data.name: swagger_remarks_lpn_reprocess
data.value:
Description:
Reprocesses the previously generated failing interface to create a LPN .

data.name: swagger_remarks_modificardetallereferencia_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to modify Inbound details.

data.name: swagger_remarks_modificardetallereferencia_update
data.value:
Description:
Based on the data provided, details of the inbound are modifed.
Operation type A(cAncel): The amount should not be specifed, as the available balance remaining to the Inbound detail will be canceled.
Operation type M(Modify): The quantity shipped is subtracted from the reference quantity in the detail if it is less than or equal to the available balance, otherwise the balance is subtracted from the available balance.
Operation type R(Replace): The reference quantity is replaced by the quantity shipped as long as it is greater than the amount consumed. (Consumed = QuantityScheduled + QuantityCancelled + QuantityReceived).
Operation type N (New): Creates a new reference detail, provided that it does not already exist.
Note: Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_modificarpedido_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to modify orders.

data.name: swagger_remarks_modificarpedido_update
data.value: Description: - Outbounds are modifed on the basis of the submitted data. - Products or quantities that are being worked operationally cannot be modifed.- Completely flled orders (sum of all balances is 0) cannot be modifed.- Order details recorded in the WMS that do not appear in the change specifcation maintain their status.- Order details recorded in the WMS that do not appear in the change specifcation maintain their status.- In case of modifying a detail, the new quantity ordered must not leave a negative balance.- In case of modifying a detail that handles duplicates, it will be required to detail the quantities requested for all duplicates, and it must be ensured that none of the duplicates has a negative balance due to the modifcation and that the sum of the quantities requested at the duplicate level coincides with the quantities requested at the detail level.- It is not possible to change the shipping type and order type if the quantity released for any of the details is greater than 0. Note: Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_pedidosanulados_getdata
data.value: Description: This interface details all the information when an order is cancelled.

data.name: swagger_remarks_pedido_create
data.value: Description: Each time you want to order merchandise from the DC, an outbound order must be created in the system providing the customer's data, an order number or order identifcation. r Notes:Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/ dd/yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_pedido_getpedido
data.value: Description: Obtains an outbound by order number, agent code, customer type and company.

data.name: swagger_remarks_pedido_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to create an outbound.

data.name: swagger_remarks_preparacion_anularpickingpedidopendiente
data.value:
Description:
Allows you to cancel the details of the unfulfilled orders.
Grades: Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . The accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] and [MM - dd yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_preparacion_picking
data.value:
Description:
From the data sent, the possibility of picking a previously released preparation is granted.
Grades: Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . The accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] and [MM - dd yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_preparacion_reprocesaranulacionpreparacionpedidopicking
data.value:
Description:
Reprocesses the interface in error previously generated by the pending pick cancellation.

data.name: swagger_remarks_preparacion_reprocesarpicking
data.value:
Description:
Reprocesses the interface in error generated previously when picking.

data.name: swagger_remarks_productoproveedor_createordelete
data.value: Description: From the data provided, create or delete the supplier code for a product.

data.name: swagger_remarks_productoproveedor_getproductoproveedor
data.value: Description: Gets the product code used by the vendor from product, company and agent code. Note: An agent can

data.name: swagger_remarks_productoproveedor_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to create or delete a supplier code.

data.name: swagger_remarks_producto_createorupdate
data.value: Description: New products are created from the data provided if they do not exist, otherwise they are updated. Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_producto_getproducto
data.value: Description: Gets a product by code and company.

data.name: swagger_remarks_producto_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses previously generated error interface to create or update a product.

data.name: swagger_remarks_referenciarecepcion_create
data.value: Description: New inbounds are created from the data provided. Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] y [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_referenciarecepcion_getreferencia
data.value: Description: Gets an inbound by identifer, company, type and customer .

data.name: swagger_remarks_referenciarecepcion_getreferenciabyid
data.value: Description: Gets a inbound by ID.

data.name: swagger_remarks_referenciarecepcion_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to create an inbound.

data.name: swagger_remarks_salida_confirmarlectura
data.value: Description: From the data provided it updates the consumed interface and saves the errors if it has them.

data.name: swagger_remarks_salida_consultarestado
data.value: Description: The status of the requested interface is returned with detailed errors, if any

data.name: swagger_remarks_salida_getejecucionespendientes
data.value: Description: A list of executions of the requested company pending consumption is returned.External interface codes of Apis Output.- 502: Confirmation of reception. - 508: Stock adjustments.- 509: Canceled orders.- 512: Confirmation of orders.- 516: Billing.

data.name: swagger_remarks_stock_ajustar
data.value:
Description:
Allows you to increase or decrease the quantity of stock of a product/lot in a location.
Grades: Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . The accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] and [MM - dd yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_stock_reprocesarajuste
data.value:
Description:
Reprocesses the interface in error generated previously when adjusting stock.

data.name: swagger_remarks_stock_reprocesartransferencia
data.value:
Description:
Reprocesses the interface in error generated previously when transferring stock.

data.name: swagger_remarks_stock_transferir
data.value:
Description:
It allows to transfer stock of a product/lot from one location to another within the same property.
Grades: Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted time format is: [HH:mm] . The accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] and [MM - dd yyyy]

data.name: swagger_response_200_egreso_create
data.value: Successful operation. The generated interface detail and each delivery's identifer and code are returned.

data.name: swagger_response_200_egreso_reprocess
data.value: Successful operation. Reprocessed interface details and the identifer and code of each delivery created are returned.

data.name: swagger_response_200_lpn_create
data.value: Successful operation. The detail of the interface generated and the number that was assigned to the new LPN created are returned.

data.name: swagger_response_200_lpn_reprocess
data.value: Successful operation. The detail of the reprocessed interface and the number assigned to the new created LPN are returned.

data.name: swagger_returns_agente_getagente
data.value: Agent found from code, type and company

data.name: swagger_returns_codigobarras_getcodigobarras
data.value: Barcode found from code and company

data.name: swagger_returns_create
data.value: The details of the generated interface and the agenda number that was assigned to the planning of that merchandise entry are returned.

data.name: swagger_returns_egreso_create
data.value: The details of the generated interface and the identifier and code of each created truck are returned.

data.name: swagger_returns_egreso_getegresoporidexterno
data.value: Shipping found from the external identifier and the EXTERNAL company code associated with it.

data.name: swagger_returns_egreso_reprocess
data.value: The details of the reprocessed interface and the identifier and code of each created truck are returned.

data.name: swagger_returns_lpn_create
data.value: The detail of the interface generated and the number that was assigned to the new LPN created are returned.

data.name: swagger_returns_lpn_getlpnbyidexternotipo
data.value: LPN found from external Id and type

data.name: swagger_returns_lpn_reprocess
data.value: The detail of the reprocessed interface and the number assigned to the new created LPN are returned.

data.name: swagger_returns_pedido_getpedido
data.value: Order found from number, agent and company

data.name: swagger_returns_productoproveedor_getproductoproveedor
data.value: Supplier product found from code, company and agent

data.name: swagger_returns_producto_getproducto
data.value: Product found from code and company

data.name: swagger_returns_referenciarecepcion_getreferencia
data.value: Reference found from reference number, company, type and agent

data.name: swagger_returns_reprocess
data.value: The details of the reprocessed interface and the agenda number that was assigned to the planning of that merchandise entry are returned.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_cantidadaceptada
data.value: Quantity equal to the quantity received, if differences are accepted.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_cantidadagendada
data.value: Amount to be received at the reception.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_cantidadagendadaoriginal
data.value: Amount to be received in a frst instance beyond the possible modifcations that the scheduled amount could have

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_cantidadcrossdocking
data.value: Quantity used to fll orders in cross-docking

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_cantidadrecibida
data.value: Quantity received for the specifed product

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_codigoproducto
data.value: Code of the product to be received

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_estado
data.value: The current status of the detail, which varies as the operation progresses.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_fechaaceptacionproblema
data.value: Corresponds to the date when the problems in the agenda were accepted, it cannot always have a value, only when differences were accepted.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_fechaalta
data.value: Date on which the insertion was made

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_fechamodificacion
data.value: Last date on which the detail was modifed.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendadetalleresponse_identificador
data.value: Lot or number that identifies the product

data.name: swagger_summary_agendarequest_fechaentrega
data.value: Delivery date It cannot be earlier than the current date.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendarequest_referencia
data.value: Reference If the type of reception is free, this feld is not required, otherwise the reference must exist and be compatible with the type

data.name: swagger_summary_agendarequest_tipoagente
data.value: The type of agent accepted depends on the type of reception. Return receipt types, agent type CLI (Cliente), normal reception types PRO (Supplier)

data.name: swagger_summary_agendarequest_tiporecepcion
data.value: Permitted reception types: -SOC: Mono OC -REFREC: Mono RR -MOC: Múltiple OC -SOD: Múltiple(OD) -DIGLIB: Free Fingerings -DEVOD: Mono return(OD) -DDIGLI: Free Digitized Return

data.name: swagger_summary_agendarequest_tiporeferencia
data.value: Permitted reference types: -OC Purchase order -OD Return order -RR Receiving reference

data.name: swagger_summary_agendaresponse_dua
data.value: DUA or customs document associated with the receipt entry. Generally only applies to those systems that have some type of integration with Customs.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendaresponse_estado
data.value: The possible statuses for the schedule are: 3 Open agenda In Edition. 4 Closed schedule (Already fnalized and accepted the reception). 11 Schedule enabled for the reception. 9 Schedule in the process of reception, with no reception problems or with problems already accepted. 10 Schedule in process of reception, with reception problems.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendaresponse_fechacierre
data.value: Timestamp at the time the schedule was closed or terminated

data.name: swagger_summary_agendaresponse_fechaentrega
data.value: Estimated delivery date of the schedule

data.name: swagger_summary_agendaresponse_nropuerta
data.value: Door number where the receipt was received or the reception was arranged.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendaresponse_numerodocumento
data.value: Reference number associated with the agenda

data.name: swagger_summary_agendaresponse_numerointerfazejecucion
data.value: Corresponds to the interface number generated when the schedule closure is processed.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendaresponse_tiporecepcion
data.value: Type of reception with which the schedule was created.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendasrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that act as an intermediary between the fle and the API. this feld can store the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendasrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_agenda_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation of a schedule.

data.name: swagger_summary_agenterequest_codigoagente
data.value: Is the supplier code or customer code. This is the code that will be displayed on all WIS screens and reports.

data.name: swagger_summary_agenterequest_descripcion
data.value: Description / name / business name of supplier or customer.

data.name: swagger_summary_agenterequest_direccion
data.value: Delivery address to be used for delivery point generation and routing in the tracking module. The recommended format for greater accuracy when geolocating is: Street + Number, Postal Code + City, Department/ State, Country

data.name: swagger_summary_agenterequest_idclientefilial
data.value: Identifes the type of afliate customer Identifes the type of afliate customer. Possible values: C - Client F - afliate P - Natural person

data.name: swagger_summary_agenterequest_numerolocalizacionglobal
data.value: The GLN, customer or supplier identifcation number, is a key to access the information in the database. It is designed to efciently improve communication between trading partners and customers, adding value to their transactions and benefting consumers. More information in: https://gs1uy.org › 17-gln-global-identifcation-number

data.name: swagger_summary_agenterequest_ordendecarga
data.value: In the case that customers are ordered in a route, this value corresponds to the order in which the customer is loaded within the route. If this functionality is not used, specify 1 or 0

data.name: swagger_summary_agenterequest_puntodeentrega
data.value: Delivery Point or unique delivery code for the customer. Can be left null, it is usually assigned automatically when Tracking is installed and georeferences the delivery address, assigning it a unique delivery point.

data.name: swagger_summary_agenterequest_ruta
data.value: It is the route that is assigned by default to the Client for the assembly of the goods delivery trip. The value depends on the WIS installation. (Check with your WIS operational manager for available values). Generally, "1" is the most commonly used value.

data.name: swagger_summary_agentesrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_agentesrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel.This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_agente_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation or update of an agent.

data.name: swagger_summary_ajusteresponse_aplicacion
data.value: WIS module that generated the adjustment

data.name: swagger_summary_ajusteresponse_areaaveria
data.value: Indicates whether the adjustment was performed on a fault location

data.name: swagger_summary_ajusteresponse_funcionario
data.value: WIS user who made the adjustment

data.name: swagger_summary_ajusteresponse_ubicacion
data.value: WIS location corresponding to the setting

data.name: swagger_summary_ajustesdestock_getdata
data.value: Gets the details of the stock settings from the interface.

data.name: swagger_summary_anulacionreferenciarecepcion_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the cancellation of inbound orders.

data.name: swagger_summary_anularreferenciarequest_tiporeferencia
data.value: Reference type OC (Purchase Order) - RR (Receiving Reference) - OD (Return Order) OC y RR correspond to the type of agent PRO OD corresponds to the type of agent CLI

data.name: swagger_summary_anularreferenciasrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_anularreferenciasrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_armadohabilitado
data.value: Enables the manual arming of the delivery. True by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_cargahabilitada
data.value: Determines if the possibility of charging the output is enabled. True by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_cargalibre
data.value: Enables the depot operator to add loads through the collector even if they are not in the defnition. False by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_cierreautomatico
data.value: Enables the automatic closing of the delivery at the completion of the load. False by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_cierrehabilitado
data.value: Determine if the outfow closure is enabled. True by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_cierreparcial
data.value: Determines if the partial closure of the delivery is enabled. True by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_codigovehiculo
data.value: Exit vehicle code. Required as long as the outfow handles tracking.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_descripcion
data.value: Description of the delivery. Text describing the output, entering an identifying value would help the ofcer in the operation.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_documento
data.value: Description of the outfow document. Highly informative since it will be overwritten at the time of generating the document output.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_empresa
data.value: Outgoing Company code. If this information is not sent, it will be considered a multi-company expense.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_habilitarusocargaasignada
data.value: Enables the use of loads that are already in another output. This will move the loads from the existing delivery to the new one. False by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_idexterno
data.value: External identifer of the output sent

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_ignorarcargasinexistentes
data.value: Determines if when checking that the loads exist (Order, load or container) an error is returned or ignored without returning an error or assigning the loads to the egress

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_matricula
data.value: Vehicle registration. Required when a vehicle is not shipped, otherwise it is charged with that of the shipped vehicle.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_necesidades
data.value: Graduation needs. Example: Side loading, rear loading, small vehicle, etc. At the moment this data is not persisted, it is reserved for a future functionality.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_predio
data.value: Property Number. Specifes the warehouse property to which the outfow corresponds.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_programacionhorafin
data.value: At the moment this data is not persisted, it is reserved for a future functionality.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_programacionhorainicio
data.value: At the moment this data is not persisted, it is reserved for a future functionality.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_puerta
data.value: Door code through which the delivery leaves.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_respetaordencarga
data.value: Determines whether the order of loading is respected. True by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_ruta
data.value: Indicates the outbound route code, detailing which route the delivery belongs to. Failure to send this information will be considered as a multi-route exit.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_ruteo
data.value: Determines if the trip is routed with Tracking. True by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_requierecontrolcontenedores
data.value: Determines whether closing or invoicing the outbound requires that all associated containers have a finalized control. False by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_tracking
data.value: Determines if the output handles tracking. False by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_trackingsincronizado
data.value: Determine if there is a theoretical trip in tracking for egress. False by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_camionrequest_transportista
data.value: Code of the transport company related to the outgoing shipment. Required when a vehicle is not shipped, otherwise it is loaded with it from the shipped vehicle.

data.name: swagger_summary_cargacamionrequest_carga
data.value: Charge number to be assigned at discharge.

data.name: swagger_summary_cargacamionrequest_codigoagente
data.value: Agent code corresponding to the load to be assigned to the outgoing agent.

data.name: swagger_summary_cargacamionrequest_empresa
data.value: Company code. In the case of a single-company, the following must coincide.

data.name: swagger_summary_codigobarrarequest_cantidadembalaje
data.value: Number of units associated with the barcode. It is normal to set this value to 1 and not to automate the quantities by barcode

data.name: swagger_summary_codigobarrarequest_prioridaduso
data.value: Priority of use if barcodes are to be reprinted

data.name: swagger_summary_codigobarras_createupdateordelete
data.value: Create, overwrite or delete a barcode

data.name: swagger_summary_codigobarras_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses creation, overwriting or deletion of a barcode.

data.name: swagger_summary_codigosbarrasrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_codigosbarrasrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionderecepcion_getdata
data.value: Gets the details of the receipt confirmation

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_descripcioncamion
data.value: Truck Description Text that describes the exit, the entering of a identifying value would be helpful to the official in the operation

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_fechacierre
data.value: Closing date Exact date of when the outfow was closed.

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_fechafacturacion
data.value: Billing date Exact date when the outfow was billed

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_matricula
data.value: Registration number of the vehicle used for the delivery.

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_predio
data.value: Property Number. Specifes the location of the warehouse where the delivery took place.

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_puertaexpedicion
data.value: Shipping door Door number where the delivery is taking place.

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_ruta
data.value: Route Indicates the exit routing code, detailing to which route the delivery belongs to.

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_transportadora
data.value: Code of the transport company related to the outgoing shipment.

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionpedidoresponse_vehiculo
data.value: Vehicle code Number that identifes the vehicle used for the delivery.

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionrecepcionresponse_numerodocumento
data.value: Reference number if the entry is against a single document. Otherwise, empty

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmacionrecepcionresponse_tiporecepcion
data.value: Identifcation of the type of reception or fow within WIS

data.name: swagger_summary_confirmarlecturarequest_codigointerfazexterna
data.value: External interface of the execution code Example 502 (Confirmation of receipt)

data.name: swagger_summary_contenedorcamionrequest_empresa
data.value: Company under which the container is identifed by the pre-puncture attached to it.

data.name: swagger_summary_contenedorresponse_numerocontenedor
data.value: Container number Identifes the container used for one or more pickees. This value can be repeated for other future preparations as long as the condition of the preparation allows it.

data.name: swagger_summary_contenedorresponse_preparacion
data.value: Number that identifes a preparation. Preparation is an instance or a sequential wave of a picketed wave.

data.name: swagger_summary_contenedorresponse_subclase
data.value: Sub-class code The sub-class identifes and restricts the compatibility with the products when performing a pickeo. Possible confgurable values: -T: Toxics -F: Pharmacos -A: Food

data.name: swagger_summary_contenedorresponse_tipocontenedor
data.value: Container type Type which identifes a container and determines a series of values and standards such as the allowed range, sending data to tracking, among others.

data.name: swagger_summary_detalleagendaresponse_identificador
data.value: Product Series or Lot in case you handle it. It is an optional value and WIS will handle it in automatic mode if it is not specifed.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallemodificacionrequest_tipooperacion
data.value: Type of operation A (cAncel) - M (Modify) - R (Replace)

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidoduplicadorequest_idlineasistemaexterno
data.value: Identifcation in the ERP or external system for the order line. It is mandatory if more than one line is sent for the same product, otherwise it is optional. If defned, it is returned in the confirmation for a match in the external system.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidoduplicadorequest_serializado
data.value: Field used to send metadata in the duplicate detail.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidorequest_identificador
data.value: Lot or number that identifes the product.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidorequest_serializado
data.value: Field used to send metadata in order details.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidosalidaduplicadoresponse_cantidadproducto
data.value: Quantity of product to order. In case of confirmation of prepared merchandise, it refers to the quantity prepared. In the case of a closing deliveryw, it refers to the quantity dispatched in the vehicle.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidosalidaduplicadoresponse_idlineasistemaexterno
data.value: Identifcation in the ERP or external system for the order line.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidosalidaduplicadoresponse_serializado
data.value: Serialized In this feld you can send serialized information that is useful to customize the operation. By default it will return the same value with which it was received.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidosalidaresponse_cantidadproducto
data.value: Quantity of product to order. In case of confirmation of prepared merchandise, it refers to the quantity prepared. In the case of an outbound closing, it refers to the quantity dispatched in the delivery.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidosalidaresponse_especificaidentificador
data.value: Specifes identifer It is loaded automatically depending on whether the identifer is specifed when the order is created. In case of sending an identifer, the value of this feld will be S otherwise N. S (Yes) - N (No)

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidosalidaresponse_identificador
data.value: Lot or number that identifies the product.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepedidosalidaresponse_serializado
data.value: Serialized In this feld you can send serialized information that is useful to customize the operation. By default it will return the same value with which it was received.

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepickingrequest_carga
data.value: Load number that will be assigned to the picking

data.name: swagger_summary_detallepickingrequest_compartecontenedorpicking
data.value: Grouping value orders that regulates compatibility moment of prepare merchandise

data.name: swagger_summary_egresorequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. EIn case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_egresorequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_egreso_getegresoporidexterno
data.value: Get a delivery from an external reference.

data.name: swagger_summary_egreso_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation of a delivery.

data.name: swagger_summary_ejecucionpendienteresponse_codigointerfazexterna
data.value: External interface of the execution code Example 502 (Confrmation of receipt)

data.name: swagger_summary_empresasrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_empresa_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation or updating of a company.

data.name: swagger_summary_facturacionresponse_descripcioncamion
data.value: Description of the delivery Text describing the output, entering an identifying value would help the ofcer in the operation.

data.name: swagger_summary_facturacionresponse_fechafacturacion
data.value: Billing date Exact date when the delivery was billed

data.name: swagger_summary_facturacionresponse_matriculacamion
data.value: Registration number of the vehicle used for the delivery trip

data.name: swagger_summary_facturacionresponse_predio
data.value: Property number. Specifes the location of the warehouse where the delivery took place.

data.name: swagger_summary_facturacionresponse_puertaexpedicion
data.value: Shipping door Door number where the delivery is taking place.

data.name: swagger_summary_facturacionresponse_ruta
data.value: Route Indicates the delivery route code, detailing to which route the delivery belongs.

data.name: swagger_summary_facturacionresponse_transportadora
data.value: Code of the transport company related to the delivery shipment

data.name: swagger_summary_facturacionresponse_vehiculo
data.value: Vehicle code Number that identifes the vehicle used for the delivery trip.

data.name: swagger_summary_facturadetalleresponse_identificador
data.value: Product Series or Lot in case you handle it. It is an optional value and WIS will handle it in automatic mode if it is not specifed.

data.name: swagger_summary_filtrosstockrequest_averia
data.value: Parameter to determine if the stock is faulty and/or in a fault area. If no value is sent, the default value is false.

data.name: swagger_summary_filtrosstockrequest_codigofamilia
data.value: Product family code. The family is a classifcation that encompasses several products

data.name: swagger_summary_filtrosstockrequest_manejoidentificador
data.value: Type of product identifer management. P (Product) - L (Lot) - S (Series)

data.name: swagger_summary_filtrosstockrequest_ramo
data.value: Product branch code. The branch is a classifcation that encompasses several products.

data.name: swagger_summary_filtrosstockrequest_tipomanejofecha
data.value: Type of date management for products. This feld defnes if a product is durable, FIFO o FEFO. F (FIFO) - D (Durable) - E (Expirable)

data.name: swagger_summary_lpndatarequest_archivo
data.value: It is generally used in external systems that generate files and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the file and the API. In this field you can save the name of the original file in which the data came. If the implementation does not use files, it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_lpndatarequest_dsreferencia
data.value: It is used to generate a reference or lookup field in the execution panel of WIS interfaces. Through this field it is possible to identify or search for the trace of the execution of the interface. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this field.

data.name: swagger_summary_lpndetallerequest_fechavencimiento
data.value: Product expiration date. Required if the product has TipoManejoFecha equal to E (Expiration).

data.name: swagger_summary_lpndetallerequest_identificador
data.value: Lot or number that identifies the product. The same is required if the product handles Lot.

data.name: swagger_summary_lpndetallerequest_idlineasistemaexterno
data.value: Identifier in the ERP or external system for the detail line.

data.name: swagger_summary_lpnrequest_idexterno
data.value: Identifier of the ERP or external system for the LPN.

data.name: swagger_summary_lpnrequest_idpacking
data.value: It is used to identify a set of LPNs.

data.name: swagger_summary_lpnrequest_tipo
data.value: If a value is not sent, the value of the assigned configuration parameter will be taken.IE_535_TP_LPN_TIPO

data.name: swagger_summary_lpnsalidadetalleresponse_idlineasistemaexterno
data.value: Identification in the ERP or external system for the order line

data.name: swagger_summary_lpnsrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fes and a middleware that act as an intermediary between the fe and the API. this feld can store the name of the original fe in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fes it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_lpnsrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_lpn_reprocess
data.value: Reworks the creation of a LPN.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_codigotransportadora
data.value: Code of the carrier company related to the order

data.name: swagger_summary_modificaciondetallereferenciarequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificardetallepedidoduplicadorequest_idlineasistemaexterno
data.value: Identifcation in the ERP or external system for the order line. It is mandatory if more than one line is sent for the same product, otherwise it is optional. If defned, it is returned in the confirmation for a match in the external system.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificardetallepedidoduplicadorequest_serializado
data.value: Field used to send metadata in the duplicate detail.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificardetallepedidorequest_identificador
data.value: Lot or number that identifes the product.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificardetallepedidorequest_serializado
data.value: Field used to send metadata in order details.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificardetallereferencia_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the modifcation of reference details.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_agrupacion
data.value: Indicates how the product total is to be grouped when releasing the order. P (Order) - C (Client) - O (Wave) - R (Route)

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_codigoagente
data.value: Required - Code of the agent for which the order is being made

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_compartecontenedorpicking
data.value: Order grouping value regulating compatibility at the time of goods preparation

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_condicionliberacion
data.value: Allows grouping of the order within a given release condition. It is used as a flter to organize and classify the waves. The values preloaded in the system are: -WIS-SC: NO CONDITION -DIA: DAILIES-ALWAYS -TRA: TRANSFERS -AAPM: SELF-ASSIGN-PREPARATION-MANUAL (Check with your WIS operational manager for available values.)

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_direccion
data.value: delivery address to be used for delivery point generation and routing in the tracking module. The recommended format is: The recommended format is Street + Number, Postal Code + City, Department/State, Country

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_fechaentrega
data.value: Delivery date specifed for the order

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_latitud
data.value: Useful latitude value for tracking delivery points

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_longitud
data.value: Useful length value for tracking delivery points

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_nropedido
data.value: Required - Alphanumeric value that represents an order in the system, it forms a unique identifer together with the agent code, agent type and the company to which it belongs.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_predio
data.value: Required - Property Number. Specifes the location of the warehouse from which the order is to be fulflled.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_puntoentrega
data.value: Delivery Point or unique delivery code for the customer. Can be left null, it is usually assigned automatically when Tracking is installed and georeferences the delivery address, assigning it a unique delivery point.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_ruta
data.value: Required with default value. Indicates the route code of the order, detailing which route the delivery belongs to

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_serializado
data.value: Field used to send metadata in order header.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_tipoexpedicion
data.value: Required with default value. Indicates the shipping type for the order, regulates the order fow by specifying additional tasks for the shipment (example. invoicing, packing, normal shipments, etc.) Default values: -PRC: PRODUCTION PROCESS -WIS: BILLABLE -WSF: NOT BILLABLE

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_tipopedido
data.value: Required with default value. Specifes the order type which is directly related and has to be compatible with the shipping type.

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidorequest_zona
data.value: Specifes the zone to which the order belongs

data.name: swagger_summary_modificarpedidosrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.value: Company code of the order. In the case of a single-company, the outfow must coincide.

data.value: Alphanumeric value that represents an order in the system, forming a unique identifer together with the agent code, agent type and the company to which it belongs.

data.name: swagger_summary_pedidosrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_pedidosrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_pedido_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation of an outbound.

data.name: swagger_summary_productoproveedorrequest_codigoagente
data.value: Code of the agent to which the references belong. In WIS there can be n-suppliers that bring the same product and each supplier can have its references or codifcations on the same product.

data.name: swagger_summary_productoproveedorrequest_codigoexterno
data.value: Product reference or code for the supplier. This is the product code with which the supplier's invoice is usually specifed.

data.name: swagger_summary_productoproveedor_createordelete
data.value: Create or delete a supplier code for a product

data.name: swagger_summary_productoproveedor_getproductoproveedor
data.value: Gets the product code used by the agent.

data.name: swagger_summary_productoproveedor_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation or deletion of a supplier code for the product.

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_agrupacion
data.value: Default value for the grouping of order lines in which this product is ordered P (Order) - O (Wale) - R (Route) - C (Client)

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_codigo
data.value: Product code. It can only be composed of the following characters: 01234567890ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ-_/.*

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_codigoclase
data.value: Sector or class code. This is a confguration data in WIS. It is used to sectorize merchandise (Frozen, Toxics, Explosives, Food, etc.)

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_codigofamilia
data.value: Product family code. The family is a classifcation that encompasses several products. Can be created automatically with the product interface.

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_codigomercadologico
data.value: Additional classifcation code. It is not a unique code, it is a classifcation code. It can be shared by several products.

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_codigoproductoempresa
data.value: Additional unique product code. If not used, the same item code is assigned to it.

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_diasduracion
data.value: Days for Reception window. Applies to FEFO products only

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_diasliberacion
data.value: Days or window to release a product before its expiration date

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_diasvalidez
data.value: Days to Maturity window. Applies to FEFO products only

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_grupoconsulta
data.value: Product grouping code for the purpose of fltering external access or assigning permissions to a certain group of products.

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_manejoidentificador
data.value: Specifes how the product is handled. In the case of handling PRODUCT does not require additional data, it is the simplest mode of operation. In the case of handling LOT or SERIES, just identifying the product is not enough, it is necessary to specify or indicate the LOT or SERIES. P (Product) - L (Lot) - S (Series)

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_modalidadingresolote
data.value: Lot entry mode PMIDNOR (Normal) - PMIDVEN (Expiration) - PMIDAGE (Schedule) - PMIDDOC (Document) - PMIDIDVE (Expiration)

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_ramo
data.value: Product branch code. The branch is a classifcation that encompasses several products. Can be created automatically with the product interface

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_stockmaximo
data.value: Maximum stock quantity to be held for the item

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_stockminimo
data.value: Minimum stock quantity to be held for the item

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_tipomanejofecha
data.value: Type of date management for products. This feld defnes whether a product is durable, FIFO o FEFO. Durable: no need to carry dates in the system. FEFO: What is requested on entry is the expiration date of an item or line item. FIFO: The system assigns an entry date to the product and removes the oldest one (there is no expiration date in this case). F (FIFO) - D (Durable) - E (Expirable)

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_unidadbulto
data.value: Number of units per package. Number of units per box.

data.name: swagger_summary_productorequest_volumencc
data.value: Volume of product expressed in CM3

data.name: swagger_summary_pickingproductorequest_stockminimo
data.value: Minimum stock quantity for the picking location

data.name: swagger_summary_productosproveedorrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes

data.name: swagger_summary_productosproveedorrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_productosrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_productosrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_producto_reprocess
data.value: Reprocess the creation or update of a product.

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciadetalleresponse_identificador
data.value: Product Series or Lot in case you handle it. It is an optional value and WIS will handle it in automatic mode if it is not specifed

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciadetalleresponse_idlineasistemaexterno
data.value: Identification in the ERP or external system for the reference line. If defned later in the confirmation, it is returned for a match in the external system.

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciarecepciondetallerequest_identificador
data.value: Product Series or Lot in case you handle it. It is an optional value and the system will handle it in automatic mode if it is not specifed. Cannot have blank spaces at the beginning or at the end

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciarecepciondetallerequest_idlineasistemaexterno
data.value: Identifcation in the ERP or external system for the reference line. It is mandatory if more than one line is sent for the same product, otherwise it is optional. If defned, it is returned in the confirmation for a match in the external system.

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciarecepcionrequest_serializado
data.value: Serialized value. Reserved for additional data. Must have a valid JSON structure

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciarecepcionrequest_tipoagente
data.value: The type of Agent accepted depends on the type of reference. Return reference types, CLI agent type (Client), standard reference types PRO (Provider)

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciarecepcionrequest_tiporeferencia
data.value: Reference type OC (Purchase Order) - RR (Reception Reference) - OD (Return Order) - ODC (Return Exchange) OC y RR correspond to the type of agent PRO OD y ODC correspond to the CLI agent type

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciarecepcion_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation of an inbound

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciaresponse_memo
data.value: Additional information returned on receipt confirmation

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciaresponse_numeroreferencia
data.value: Reception reference identifer (order number, return number, etc.)

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciaresponse_tiporeferencia
data.value: Reference type OC (Purchase Order) - RR (Reception reference) - OD (Return Order) - ODC (Return Exchange) OC y RR correspond to the type of agent PRO OD y ODC correspond to the CLI agent type

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciasrecepcionrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purpose.

data.name: swagger_summary_referenciasrecepcionrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_salida_confirmarlectura
data.value: Updates the status of an interface.

data.name: swagger_summary_salida_consultarestado
data.value: Gets the status of the interface.

data.name: swagger_summary_stockresponse_stockgeneral
data.value: Stock on hand + stock on vehicles, blocked and others.

data.name: swagger_summary_ajusteresponse_atributos
data.value: Attributes of the LPN associated with the adjustment.

data.name: swagger_remarks_almacenamiento_getdata
data.value:
Description:
This interface details all the information when a tag is stored.

data.name: swagger_remarks_confirmaciondeproduccion_getdata
data.value: This interface details all the information reported during a production.

data.name: swagger_remarks_produccion_create
data.value:
Description:
A production entry is generated using the submitted data. If a formula is sent, an order will be automatically generated for it. Notes: Decimals must be sent using '.'. The accepted time format is: [HH:mm]. The accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy], and [MM - dd yyyy].

data.name: swagger_summary_produccionesrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search field in the WIS interface execution panel. Through this field, it is possible to identify or search for the execution trace of the interface. In case of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this field.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccionesrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate files and middleware acting as an intermediary between the file and the API. In this field, the original file name in which the data was received can be stored. If the implementation does not use files, it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccionrequest_espacioproduccion
data.value: Production space associated with the production.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccionrequest_idmodalidadlote
data.value: Identifier for batch entry modality for the produced products.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccion_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the generation of a production entry.

data.name: swagger_remarks_produccion_reprocess
data.value:
Description:
Reprocesses the previously generated error interface for a production entry.

data.name: swagger_response_200_produccion_reprocess
data.value: Successful operation. Returns the details of the reprocessed interface.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccion_getproduccion
data.value: Gets a production and its details.

data.name: swagger_remarks_produccion_getproduccion
data.value:
Description:
Retrieves data of a production based on its internal identifier.

data.name: swagger_returns_produccion_getproduccion
data.value: Production found based on the internal Id.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccion_getproduccionbyidexternoempresa
data.value: Gets a production and its details.

data.name: swagger_remarks_produccion_getproduccionbyidexternoempresa
data.value:
Description:
Retrieves data of a production based on the external identifier and the company.

data.name: swagger_returns_produccion_getproduccionbyidexternoempresa
data.value: Production found based on the external Id and company.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccionresponse_idmodalidadlote
data.value: Identifier of the lot entry modality for produced products.

data.name: swagger_summary_confrmacionpedidoresponse_descripcioncamion
data.value: Description of the delivery Text describing the output, entering an identifying value would help the ofcer in the operation.

data.name: swagger_summary_barrasrequest_tipo
data.value: Barcode type. If you do not send one, the CB type will be taken by default.

data.name: swagger_summary_consumirproduccionrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_consumirproduccionrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_consumirproduccionrequest_idproduccionexterno
data.value: External ID of the production order in which consumption will take place. The order must be active in a production slot. If the external ID of the production order is not specified but the production slot ID is entered, an active revenue will be automatically searched for in that slot. If the production slot ID is specified, it must correspond to the active revenue in that slot.

data.name: swagger_summary_consumirproduccionrequest_confirmarmovimiento
data.value: Indicates whether stock movements generated as a result of the specified consumption should be notified via the ConfirmacionDeProduccion API.

data.name: swagger_summary_consumirproduccionrequest_finalizarproduccion
data.value: Specifies whether production should be finalized after completing the consumption. If so, the ConfirmacionDeProduccion interface execution will also be triggered to notify this finalization.

data.name: swagger_summary_insumosconsumirrequest_producto
data.value: Code of the product to consume.

data.name: swagger_summary_insumosconsumirrequest_identificador
data.value: Identifier of the product to consume (series or batch).

data.name: swagger_summary_insumosconsumirrequest_ubicacion
data.value: Code of the production location within the space where the production order is active for consumption purposes. This field is optional; if left blank, the only production location currently managed in the space will be assumed.

data.name: swagger_summary_insumosconsumirrequest_referencia
data.value: Value used to segment the consumable materials based on the container used during the space supply process. If not specified, the consumption will follow the order of entry of the same product in the production space.

data.name: swagger_summary_insumosconsumirrequest_cantidad
data.value: Quantity of the product to consume.

data.name: swagger_summary_insumosconsumirrequest_motivo
data.value: Code of the consumption reason, corresponding to the domain MOT_CONS.

data.name: swagger_summary_insumosconsumirrequest_usarsoloreserva
data.value: Indicates whether the consumption should be limited exclusively to the reserved quantity of the specified product. If set to "false," the reserved quantity will be prioritized, and once it is completely consumed, the available stock will continue to be consumed.

data.name: swagger_summary_producirproduccionrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this field.

data.name: swagger_summary_producirproduccionrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_producirproduccionrequest_idproduccionexterno
data.value: External ID of the production order in which the specified products will be manufactured. The order must be active in a production slot. If the external ID of the production order is not specified but the production slot ID is entered, an active revenue will be automatically searched for in that slot. If the production slot ID is specified, it must correspond to the active revenue in that slot.

data.name: swagger_summary_producirproduccionrequest_confirmarmovimiento
data.value: Indicates whether stock movements generated as a result of the specified production should be notified via the ConfirmacionDeProduccion API.

data.name: swagger_summary_producirproduccionrequest_finalizarproduccion
data.value: Indicates whether the production should be finalized after producing the specified items. If so, an execution of the ConfirmacionDeProduccion interface will also be triggered to notify this completion.

data.name: swagger_summary_productosproducirrequest_producto
data.value: Code of the product to be produced.

data.name: swagger_summary_productosproducirrequest_identificador
data.value: Identifier of the product to be produced (serial or batch)

data.name: swagger_summary_productosproducirrequest_ubicacion
data.value: Production location code within the space where the production order is active for the manufacturing of the specified products. This field is optional; if left blank, the only production location currently managed in the space will be assumed.

data.name: swagger_summary_productosproducirrequest_vencimiento
data.value: Expiration date of the produced batch (if the product is expirable).

data.name: swagger_summary_productosproducirrequest_cantidad
data.value: Quantity of the product to be produced.

data.name: swagger_summary_productosproducirrequest_motivo
data.value: Production reason code, corresponding to the domain MOT_PROD.

data.name: swagger_remarks_producirproduccion_produce
data.value: Description: Based on the data provided, merchandise associated with a production order is produced. The specified totals must be summarized by product / lot / reason.

data.name: swagger_remarks_producirproduccion_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the previously generated failed interface to produce merchandise.

data.name: swagger_remarks_consumirproduccion_consume
data.value: Description: Based on the data provided, inputs associated with production order are consumed. The specified totals must be summarized by product / lot / reason / reference.

data.name: swagger_remarks_consumirproduccion_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the previously generated failed interface to consume merchandise.

data.name: swagger_summary_agendarequest_liberaragenda
data.value: Agenda release. This value allows you to create the agenda and automatically release it at the same time

data.name: swagger_summary_consumirproduccionrequest_idespacio
data.value: Specifies the production space code on which consumption will take place. If the production ID is specified, the space code must match the one associated with the production entry. Otherwise, an active entry will be searched for in the space. If there is no active entry in the space, an error will be returned.

data.name: swagger_summary_producirproduccionrequest_idespacio
data.value: Specifies the code of the production space on which production will be performed. If the production ID is specified, the space code must match the one associated with the production entry. Otherwise, an active entry will be searched for in the space. If there is no active entry in the space, an error will be returned.

data.name: swagger_summary_consumirproduccionrequest_iniciarproduccion
data.value: Boolean value indicating whether production is to be started. The entry must be associated with the production slot, the slot must not have another active entry, and it cannot have multiple entries not yet started. If only the slot ID is specified, it must be associated with a single unstarted entry.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccionrequest_generarpedido
data.value: Indicates whether an order with the supplies should be generated.

data.name: swagger_summary_produccionrequest_liberarpedido
data.value: Indicates whether the order should be automatically released.

data.name: swagger_remarks_controldecalidad_createorupdate
data.value: Associates or Approves quality controls based on a product.

data.name: swagger_summary_controlcalidadrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_controlcalidadrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that act as an intermediary between the fle and the API. this feld can store the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_controlcalidadrequest_controlesdecalidad
data.value: List of controls and criteria to Associate or Approve.

data.name: swagger_summary_controlcalidaditemrequest_codigocontrolcalidad
data.value: Code of the quality control to operate.

data.name: swagger_summary_controlcalidaditemrequest_textoinformativo
data.value: Used to have a descriptive field.

data.name: swagger_summary_controlcalidaditemrequest_criteriosdeseleccion
data.value: Criteria to filter the instances to operate.

data.name: swagger_summary_criterioseleccionitemrequest_etiquetaexterna
data.value: Allows analyzing a label through its external number or an LPN through its external ID.

data.name: swagger_summary_criterioseleccionitemrequest_tipoetiquetaexterna
data.value: Indicates the type of label in case there is more than one label with the same external number. If there is only one, it is not required.

data.name: swagger_summary_criterioseleccionitemrequest_producto
data.value: Code of the product to operate.

data.name: swagger_summary_criterioseleccionitemrequest_lote
data.value: If the indicated product manages a batch, it can be specified here; if it does not manage a batch, it is not required.

data.name: swagger_remarks_controldecalidad_reprocess
data.value: Associates or Approves quality controls based on a product.(reprocess)

data.name: swagger_response_200_controldecalidad_createorupdate
data.value: Returns the generated and approved criteria along with the indicated criteria

data.name: swagger_response_200_controldecalidad_reprocess
data.value: Returns the generated and approved criteria along with the indicated criteria

data.name: swagger_summary_controlcalidaditemrequest_estado
data.value: Used to indicate whether the operation is Association or Approval. The possible values are 'CTRASC' (Create) or 'CTRAPR' (Approve).

data.name: swagger_summary_factura_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation of a bill

data.name: swagger_remarks_factura_create
data.value: Description: New bills are created from the data provided. Decimals must be sent with '.'. Accepted date formats are: [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy] and [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_remarks_factura_getfactura
data.value: Description: Gets a bill by bill number, company, serial number and customer .

data.name: swagger_remarks_factura_reprocess
data.value: Description: Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to create a Bill.

data.name: swagger_returns_factura_getfactura
data.value: Bill found from bill number, company, serial number and agent

data.name: swagger_summary_pickingproducto_createupdateordelete
data.value: Create, overwrite, or delete a picking location

data.name: swagger_remarks_pickingproducto_createupdateordelete
data.value:
Description:
The functionality is determined by the type of operation sent. Add: A new picking location is created with the data. Overwrite: If the picking location exists, it will update the existing data. Delete: If the picking location exists, it will be deleted.
Note: Decimals must be sent with a '.'. The accepted time format is [HH:mm]. The accepted date formats are [yyyy-MM-dd], [yyyy/MM/dd], [MM/dd/yyyy], and [MM-dd-yyyy]

data.name: swagger_summary_pickingproducto_reprocess
data.value: Reprocesses the creation, overwriting, or deletion of a picking location.

data.name: swagger_remarks_pickingproducto_reprocess
data.value:
Description:
Reprocesses the previously generated error interface to create, overwrite, or delete a picking location.

data.name: swagger_summary_pickingproductorequest_stockmaximo
data.value: Maximum stock quantity for the picking location

data.name: swagger_summary_pickingproductorequest_cantidaddesborde
data.value: Overflow quantity for the picking location

data.name: swagger_summary_pickingproductosrequest_dsreferencia
data.value: Used to generate a reference or a search feld in the WIS interface execution panel. This feld can be used to identify or search for the trace of the interface execution. In the event of an incident or unexpected processing, the problem can be reported by referring to the value of this feld.

data.name: swagger_summary_pickingproductosrequest_archivo
data.value: Generally used in external systems that generate fles and a middleware that acts as an intermediary between the fle and the API. In this feld you can save the name of the original fle in which the data came from. In case the implementation does not use fles it can be used for other purposes.

data.name: swagger_summary_pickingproductorequest_flagconfirmarcodbarrasautomatismo
data.value: Flag that allows you to enable or disable barcode confirmation in the automation.

data.name: swagger_summary_anulacionpedidopendienterequest_compartecontenedorpicking
data.value: Grouping value for orders that regulates compatibility when preparing goods
